title: pyrus indurata
intro: Pyrus indurata, also known as the Chinese wild apple, is a plant species native to the mountainous regions of China and Taiwan. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Pyrus indurata include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting digestion. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
